preamble.summary: Israel's apostasy recalled. LXX is slightly shorter, omitting some emphatic doublings present in the MT.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX omits several small phrases that appear in MT as expansions. Verse 2 has a minor difference in the 'devotion of your youth' phrase.
preamble.structural_notes: Chapter/verse numbering is identical between LXX and MT for this chapter.

variant_notes: LXX and MT are substantially identical here.
LXX reads χάριν 'grace/favor' for חֶסֶד 'covenant loyalty'. The Greek captures only part of the Hebrew semantic range.

verses.mt_reading: הֲלוֹא־זֹאת תַּעֲשֶׂה־לָּךְ עָזְבֵךְ אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהַיִךְ בְּעֵת מוֹלִיכֵךְ בַּדָּרֶךְ
verses.lxx_reading: οὐχὶ ταῦτα ἐποίησέν σοι τὸ καταλιπεῖν σε ἐμέ
variant_notes: LXX lacks בְּעֵת מוֹלִיכֵךְ בַּדָּרֶךְ 'at the time of leading you in the way' — a shorter reading.

variant_notes: LXX shortens the list — MT has 'they, their kings, their princes, their priests, and their prophets'; LXX has a shorter enumeration.
